name: Athletic Mixed-Race Girl
description: Athletic and slim build. Eurasian features: Anne Hathaway's smile + Song Hye Kyo's soft oval face and almond eyes + Natalie Portman's straight nose. Light brown/reddish hair tied in a low bun with face-framing pieces. Pale skin.
face_dna: [Anne Hathaway] (warm smile) + [Song Hye Kyo] (soft oval face, gentle almond eyes) + [Natalie Portman] (straight nose, elegant aura)
face_id: Oval face, smooth jawline, gentle brown double eyelid almond eyes, straight nose with slightly rounded tip, medium full natural lips. Light brown/reddish hair, center part, low bun with natural wavy face-framing strands.
body_map: Athletic and slim build, long limbs, flat firm abdomen, pale skin. No visible tattoos or scars.
